reason: Review global architecture red lines, implementation stack, and evidence scope before accepting the round.
Check that core/shared orchestration does not gain family-specific semantic branches outside plugin/target boundaries.
Check RVV finite binary family, selected config, body authority, and vsub/vadd marker semantics.
Check generated artifacts remain extension-op-to-EmitC/intrinsic route and not descriptor-driven source emission.
Check dynamic source-tail metadata, runtime ABI, selected-plan coherence, and target artifact front-door behavior.
Check focused lit/build/artifact/ssh-rvv evidence expectations and no overclaiming.
